fleet-wraith.heading: Why Rent the Rolls-Royce Wraith in Dubai
fleet-wraith.quickAnswer: Rent a Rolls-Royce Wraith in Dubai from AED 5,000/day — the 624 hp V12 fastback coupe, chauffeur-driven or self-drive, with free delivery across Dubai.
keyFacts: Rolls-Royce Wraith rental in Dubai starts at AED 5,000 per day; hourly from AED 800 (2-hour minimum), with discounted weekly and monthly rates.
The Wraith is a 2-door fastback grand-touring coupe with a 6.6L twin-turbo V12 producing 624 hp and 0–100 km/h in 4.6 seconds.
Available chauffeur-driven or self-drive for qualifying renters, with free delivery across Dubai including Downtown, Marina, Palm Jumeirah and DIFC.
Book 24/7 via WhatsApp +971 55 816 4922; service offered in English, Arabic and Russian by Rolls-Royce Dubai (Naqra FZE).
body: The Rolls-Royce Wraith rental in Dubai pairs a 624hp twin-turbo V12 with the brand's most dramatic fastback coupe silhouette, making it the grand tourer of choice for drives along Sheikh Zayed Road, Palm Jumeirah and Downtown. Rates start from AED 5,000 per day, and every booking includes a professional chauffeur plus free delivery anywhere across Dubai.

Whether you want the Wraith for a photoshoot, a corporate arrival or a sweeping coastal cruise, the suicide-door coupe and starlight headliner turn every journey into an occasion. Reserve your Rolls-Royce Wraith rental in Dubai over WhatsApp 24/7, with multilingual support and airport pickup from DXB or DWC arranged on request.

faqs.question: How much does it cost to rent a Rolls-Royce Wraith in Dubai?
faqs.answer: Rolls-Royce Wraith rental in Dubai starts at AED 5,000 per day. Multi-day and weekly rates are discounted, and chauffeur service plus free delivery within Dubai are included. Contact us on +971 55 816 4922 for a custom quote.

faqs.question: Can I rent a Rolls-Royce Wraith in Dubai with a driver?
faqs.answer: Yes. Every Wraith rental can be booked with a professional chauffeur, or self-drive if you prefer. Chauffeur-driven hire is popular for weddings, business travel and photoshoots. Just tell us your preference when booking.

faqs.question: Is delivery of the Wraith free in Dubai?
faqs.answer: Yes, we deliver the Rolls-Royce Wraith free of charge to your hotel, residence or Dubai International Airport. Delivery to other emirates can be arranged on request.

faqs.question: What do I need to rent a Rolls-Royce Wraith in Dubai?
faqs.answer: For self-drive you need a valid driving licence (UAE licence or a passport plus International Driving Permit for visitors), Emirates ID or passport, and a refundable security deposit. Chauffeur bookings require no licence.

faqs.question: Does the Wraith have a Starlight headliner for photoshoots?
faqs.answer: Yes. The Rolls-Royce Wraith features the iconic Starlight headliner, making it a favourite for photoshoots, weddings and special occasions in Dubai. Black Badge editions may be available on request.
